assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime starts and resolves TOTP enrollment from the session
assertionResults.title: starts and resolves TOTP enrollment from the session

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime consumes matching recovery codes and persists the remaining set
assertionResults.title: consumes matching recovery codes and persists the remaining set

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime builds security summary with oauth email suggestion and separated local auth identifiers
assertionResults.title: builds security summary with oauth email suggestion and separated local auth identifiers

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime prefers the most recent verified oauth email when building security summary
assertionResults.title: prefers the most recent verified oauth email when building security summary

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime falls back to the most recent unverified oauth email when no verified email exists
assertionResults.title: falls back to the most recent unverified oauth email when no verified email exists

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime returns null oauth email suggestion when identities do not provide email
assertionResults.title: returns null oauth email suggestion when identities do not provide email

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime marks local auth pending only when local auth requires totp and totp is still disabled
assertionResults.title: marks local auth pending only when local auth requires totp and totp is still disabled

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime does not mark local auth pending when totp is already enabled
assertionResults.title: does not mark local auth pending when totp is already enabled

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime returns null local auth fields when local auth is not configured
assertionResults.title: returns null local auth fields when local auth is not configured

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime uses username as compatibility identifier when local auth has no email
assertionResults.title: uses username as compatibility identifier when local auth has no email

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime prefers local auth email over username in compatibility identifier
assertionResults.title: prefers local auth email over username in compatibility identifier

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime reports local auth enabled only when password hash exists and record is active
assertionResults.title: reports local auth enabled only when password hash exists and record is active

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime reports local auth disabled when record is disabled
assertionResults.title: reports local auth disabled when record is disabled

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime reports local auth enabled when active password hash exists
assertionResults.title: reports local auth enabled when active password hash exists

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime returns no oauth suggestion when identity loader is absent or empty
assertionResults.title: returns no oauth suggestion when identity loader is absent or empty

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime keeps local auth compatibility identifier null when no local identifiers exist
assertionResults.title: keeps local auth compatibility identifier null when no local identifiers exist

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime ignores disabled identities when summarizing oauth email
assertionResults.title: ignores disabled identities when summarizing oauth email

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime accepts identity records ordered with verified email taking priority over recency
assertionResults.title: accepts identity records ordered with verified email taking priority over recency

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime uses lastUsedAt before updatedAt when picking oauth email suggestion
assertionResults.title: uses lastUsedAt before updatedAt when picking oauth email suggestion

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime uses linkedAt when other oauth identity timestamps are absent
assertionResults.title: uses linkedAt when other oauth identity timestamps are absent

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime treats malformed oauth timestamps as lowest priority
assertionResults.title: treats malformed oauth timestamps as lowest priority

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime does not expose oauth suggestion when every email value is empty
assertionResults.title: does not expose oauth suggestion when every email value is empty

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime keeps active session count in security summary
assertionResults.title: keeps active session count in security summary

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime keeps recovery code count in security summary
assertionResults.title: keeps recovery code count in security summary

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime marks totp disabled in summary when mfa record is disabled
assertionResults.title: marks totp disabled in summary when mfa record is disabled

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime preserves issuer and account label metadata in summary
assertionResults.title: preserves issuer and account label metadata in summary

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime exposes icon url metadata in summary
assertionResults.title: exposes icon url metadata in summary

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime returns false local auth pending when there is no local auth record
assertionResults.title: returns false local auth pending when there is no local auth record

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime returns false local auth enabled when there is no local auth record
assertionResults.title: returns false local auth enabled when there is no local auth record

assertionResults.fullName: auth-security-runtime throttles session index updates by SID touch interval
assertionResults.title: throttles session index updates by SID touch interval

assertionResults.title: rate limits Discord auth before generating oauth state

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes skips the oauth callback limiter when /login has no callback params
assertionResults.title: skips the oauth callback limiter when /login has no callback params

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes rate limits the oauth callback before contacting Discord
assertionResults.title: rate limits the oauth callback before contacting Discord

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes rate limits MFA verification before code validation
assertionResults.title: rate limits MFA verification before code validation

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes rejects MFA verification before the handler when no pending session exists
assertionResults.title: rejects MFA verification before the handler when no pending session exists

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes returns gone for password login because the flow is disabled
assertionResults.title: returns gone for password login because the flow is disabled

assertionResults.title: returns gone for password login even when the identifier looks valid

assertionResults.title: starts Google auth with the resolved callback URI

assertionResults.title: persists the resolved Google redirect URI in session before redirecting

assertionResults.title: uses the session Google redirect URI during token exchange

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes uses user_identities to resolve Google callback
assertionResults.title: uses user_identities to resolve Google callback

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes rejects Google callback when email is not verified
assertionResults.title: rejects Google callback when email is not verified

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes uses user_identities to resolve Discord callback
assertionResults.title: uses user_identities to resolve Discord callback

assertionResults.title: rejects Discord callback when identity is missing

assertionResults.fullName: registerAuthRoutes clears the session cookie with the same secure attributes on logout
assertionResults.title: clears the session cookie with the same secure attributes on logout
